::::: {#exr-u1-basic-conv}
### Basic Conversions
a)  Write 20% as a decimal.\
b)  Write 9% as a fraction.

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## 🔍 View Solution

a)  $20 \div 100 = \mathbf{0.2}$\
b)  $\mathbf{\frac{9}{100}}$
:::

::: exercise-meta
[Topic: Basic Conversions]{.badge .topic-badge} [Skills: Percentage-to-Decimal/Fraction]{.badge .skill-badge}
:::
:::::
